## HORIZON chart, EVIDENTIA style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-TIM-12",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "trend",
    "pattern"
  ],
  "form": "folded value bands per row: darker = higher, in tight strips",
  "data_required": "6-12 series over many periods, scanned for anomalies, not read",
  "family": "TIM",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-TIM-06 (fewer rows, simpler)",
    "CH-TIM-01 (few series, exact)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "under ~6 series",
      "use": "CH-TIM-06"
    },
    {
      "when": "values must be read",
      "use": "CH-TIM-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- WARN: dense monitoring walls scanned for where and when, never how much
- many series in little vertical space

Do NOT use when:
- reading values (folding destroys them by design)
- audiences who have never seen a horizon chart

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title naming the anomaly",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "of the folded layers",
  "rows": "[{label, values}], >= 8 points"
}
```

```json
      "left": 208,

      "size": 12,
      "offset": 16
    }
  }
}
```

### Rules
- 3 folded layers, shared across rows; opacity encodes the layer
- the layer key (each layer = N units) printed under the strips
- rows share one scale: darkness IS comparable across rows

### Never do this
- WARN ENTRY: horizons are for trained monitoring eyes; anyone else needs CH-TIM-06
- per-row scales sold as comparable
- reading values off folds

### QA before delivering
- [ ] shared scale
- [ ] layer key printed
- [ ] >= 8 points per row
- [ ] source present

### Colors (resolved, use these exact values)

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| band | `#2251FF` |
| baseline | `#C7D0D9` |
| category_label | `#3C4A5A` |
| key | `#3C4A5A` |
| title | `#0B1F35` |
| source | `#3C4A5A` |

### Fonts

- Title font: Georgia,serif, weight 700
- All other text: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

Draw the kicker bar and CAPS eyebrow defined in the layout, and use title y_with_eyebrow.
